text: I want to give you a brief {{c1::incident update}} on the current status of the outage.
explanation: An incident update is a concise communication about what is happening, who is involved, and what steps are being taken.
usage:
Pattern: incident update / status update
  • We sent an incident update to all affected users.
  • The incident update confirmed that the issue was contained.
spanish: Quiero darles una breve actualización sobre el estado actual del incidente.

text: The issue is currently affecting a small number of {{c1::affected users}} in the EU region.
explanation: Affected users are the people who are experiencing the problem or disruption.
usage:
Pattern: affected users / impacted users
  • We are notifying affected users now.
  • Only a subset of impacted users is currently affected.
spanish: El problema está afectando actualmente a un pequeño número de usuarios afectados en la región de la UE.

text: Our first priority is {{c1::containment}} so the issue does not expand to more customers.
explanation: Containment is the immediate action taken to limit the impact of an incident.
usage:
Pattern: containment / mitigate impact
  • The containment step was successful.
  • We are mitigating the impact as quickly as possible.
spanish: Nuestra primera prioridad es contener el problema para que no se extienda a más clientes.

text: We have identified the {{c1::root cause}} and we are validating the fix in staging.
explanation: The root cause is the underlying reason why the problem happened.
usage:
Pattern: root cause / underlying issue
  • The root cause was a failed deployment.
  • We are validating the underlying issue now.
spanish: Hemos identificado la causa raíz y estamos validando la solución en staging.

text: We are taking steps to {{c1::restore trust}} by being transparent and proactive.
explanation: Restoring trust means rebuilding confidence after a service problem or mistake.
usage:
Pattern: restore trust / rebuild confidence
  • Transparent communication helps restore trust.
  • The team is rebuilding confidence with customers.
spanish: Estamos tomando medidas para recuperar la confianza siendo transparentes y proactivos.
